title: Pricing and Renewal in SiteFlow Explained
metaTitle: Pricing and Renewal in SiteFlow Explained
metaDescription: SiteFlow plans start at Rs. 12,000 per user per year. Covers Business, Business+, and Enterprise plans, add-ons, renewal process, and steps to include more users.
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:
SiteFlow is priced per user per year. All plans are billed annually. There are three plans –

What is Included in Each Plan

Business — built for small construction businesses that need daily site control. Covers payments and expenses, labour attendance and salary, material request and inventory, CRM, tasks, subcontractor work orders and RA billing, and file management.

Business+ — everything in Business, plus advanced features for mid-sized to large companies. Adds BOQ and RA bills, design management, budget control, central warehouse, RFQ and purchase orders, staff payroll, assets and equipment, site inspection, and multi-level approvals.

Enterprise — everything in Business+, plus GPS attendance, custom roles, custom dashboard, accounting integrations (Zoho, Tally, SAP), unlimited users, and options for vendor portal, client portal, and white-label solution. Pricing is custom.

For a full side-by-side comparison, visit siteflow.com/SiteFlow-pricing/.

Renewal

For renewal, contact your support team via the WhatsApp group created for your company. They will assist you with pricing, user count, and any add-ons. You can also reach out via siteflow.com/contact/.

Adding More Users

If your company’s user limit has been reached and you need to add more users, contact the support team via your company’s WhatsApp group. They will guide you on purchasing additional user seats.

Add-Ons

The following add-ons can be purchased separately on top of any plan:

To purchase any add-on, contact the support team via your company’s WhatsApp group.

Common Questions

Is there a minimum number of users? Yes. All plans require a minimum of 3 users. The minimum billing is Rs. 36,000 / year for Business and Rs. 45,000 / year for Business+.

Can plans be customized? Yes. If the standard plans do not fully fit your requirements, contact the team to discuss a tailored plan.

Is there a free trial? SiteFlow offers a free guided product demo where the team shows you the software live. Book at siteflow.com/contact/.

Are there discounts for annual billing? All plans are already structured as annual subscriptions, which saves approximately 23% compared to monthly billing.
